title: LinusMinus
description: This modpack only adds some mods that enhances gameplay and performance, while not adding any new blocks or mechanics to the game.
body:
# LinusMinus
This modpack aims to create an enhanced vanilla expierance and keeps all saves played with this modpack playable with vanilla. It does this by only adding mods that enhances gameplay and performance, while not adding any new blocks or mechanics to the game.

The main gameplay elements it adds are a mini- and worldmap. It also adds easier inventory management, which additionally makes things like bulk crafting and bulk trading much faster. Of course an extremely lightweight shaderpack, which works without Iris, is also included. If you want other shaderpacks, the Iris mod is also included.

## A full list of gameplay mods
- Better Statistics Screen: Adds a better statistics screen
- Betterf3: Adds a more ordered and coloured F3 screen
- Carpet: Adds a bunch of technical Minecraft features, like tickwarp or viewing TPS
- Continuity: Adds connected glass and grass
- Controlling: Adds an search bar to the key-binding menu
- Inventory Profiles Next: Inventory sorting!
- RyoamicLights/LambDynamicLights: Adds dynamic lights
- WI Zoom: Adds the ability to zoom
- Mod Menu: View your installed Mods and edit their config!
- Peek: Hover over shulker boxes in your inventory and see what they contain
- Worldtime: Gives you a little nicely readable clock
- Xaero's Minimap and Worldmap: Minimap and worldmap, what else should I say?
- Chunky: pre generate your chunks (if wanted)
- One World Folder: Allows you to access worlds from other minecraft instances
- worldtime: Show the current minecraft time of the day
- e4mc: Allows multiplayer without a server
- jade: Shows you which Block/Entity you are looking at
- litematica: Create and Load Schematics to pre-build in creativ :)
- miniHUD: Show all kind of ranges (e.g. spawn range) and cirles

## A full list of Performance/Other Mods:
- More Culling: Performance!
- Iris Shaders: Adds support for custom shaderpacks
- Sodium, Sodium Extra, Reese's Sodium Options: Performance!
- Dynamic FPS: Reduce FPS when minecraft is in the background.

## Resourcepacks (can be enabled optionally):
- Energy Shaders: Vanilla Minecraft Shaderpack
- Alacrity: Medivial resourcepack
- 3D Default: Adds 3D models to some vanilla blocks.

## Modpack updates
This modpack will always be updated to the newest Minecraft version. If a beta version is released, it means a lot of the mods are still not updated to this Minecraft version and a new update will come soon.

### Chunky example usage:
```
worldborder center 0 0
worldborder set 20000
chunky worldborder
chunky start
```
